commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Moses spoke before the LORD, saying, Behold, the children of Israel have not hearkened unto me; how then shall Pharaoh hear me, who am of uncircumcised lips. Uncircumcised lips. So he calls the defect he had in his words, or utterance. (Challoner) The Hebrews call the heart, uncircumcised, when it has any natural or moral defect, Acts vii. (Tirinus) "I do not speak the language in its purity. , "I express my sentiments with difficulty "chap.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Uncircumcised lips: So he calls the defect he had in his words, or utterance.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
